title: Stay informed, stay connected: Public Health Agency of Canada social media - Canada.ca
content:
## Stay informed, stay connected
These tools will help ensure you get important health information through the online channels that you use.
Follow the Public Health Agency on X.
Join the Public Health Agency community on Facebook.
Watch Public Health Agency of Canada videos on YouTube.
Stay in touch by subscribing to our RSS updates and get ongoing news and alerts delivered directly to your RSS reader .
Learn more on RSS tool .
Share interesting web pages by emailing them, posting them to your social networking page or linking them to social bookmarking sites.
These tools are offered on select web pages.
Subscribe to our mailing lists.
Social Media Terms and Conditions
How we interact with the public on social media platforms, frequency, following, sharing
